assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and an email address suitable for the selected no-cost Databricks option.
No Databricks account or workspace exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Databricks account and complete the Query and visualize data from a notebook tutorial.

first_success.outcome: A notebook queries samples.nyctaxi.trips and saves a bar-chart visualization of the results.
first_success.observable_signal: After Save in the visualization editor, the configured bar chart appears as a notebook output visualization.

route_selection.surface: Databricks Free Edition or free trial signup plus workspace notebook tutorial
route_selection.rule: Official docs present Free Edition and free trial as consequential peer no-cost options; do not invent a winner without a bounded account type.

candidates.name: Databricks Free Edition then notebook visualization tutorial
candidates.reason: Free Edition is recommended for personal learning and links the notebook tutorial, but signup methods and whether Unity Catalog plus compute requirements are always met remain unverified.

candidates.name: Databricks free trial then notebook visualization tutorial
candidates.reason: Free trial is the commercial-evaluation peer path with credits and different terms; signup and workspace bootstrap differ from Free Edition.

required_path.action: Sign up for the selected Databricks Free Edition or free trial option.

required_fields.label: Preferred signup method
required_fields.notes: Docs say choose a preferred signup method; the public signup page did not expose concrete field controls in the fetch.

required_path.observable_result: Databricks creates or grants access to a workspace the developer can open.

required_path.action: In the workspace, click New then Notebook to create a blank notebook.
required_path.observable_result: A blank notebook opens in the workspace.

required_path.action: Paste a query against samples.nyctaxi.trips, run the cell, then configure and save the bar-chart visualization.
required_path.observable_result: The saved bar chart appears in the notebook output.

prerequisites.description: Workspace must have Unity Catalog enabled and permission to use or create compute.

external_gates.description: Identity-provider or email verification flows implied by the chosen signup method.

unavoidable_waits.description: Databricks must finish creating the Free Edition or trial workspace before notebook work can start.

platform_outcomes.description: Free Edition signup creates a serverless workspace with default storage for learning use.
Running the notebook cell returns samples.nyctaxi.trips query results for visualization.

excluded.item: Genie Code agent prompt alternative shown on the tutorial page
excluded.reason: The tutorial still documents the manual notebook path; Genie is presented as an optional assistant prompt.

excluded.item: Reading Free Edition marketing FAQ as a product action
excluded.reason: Marketing and FAQ pages are evidence, not counted path steps.

sources.title: Get started tutorials on Databricks
evidence_supported: Entry to Query and visualize data tutorial

sources.title: Sign up for Databricks Free Edition
Sign up for Databricks Free Edition versus free trial
evidence_supported: Free trial versus Free Edition comparison
Different terms, credits, and feature access

sources.title: Tutorial: Query and visualize data from a notebook
Databricks Free Edition marketing page
evidence_supported: Sign up for Free Edition CTA and positioning

uncertainties.question: Should the measured path use Free Edition or the free trial?
uncertainties.impact: Account type changes signup fields, payment expectations, compute model, and whether tutorial requirements are met out of the box.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Bound one account type, then walk a fresh signup through the notebook tutorial on that workspace.

uncertainties.question: Which exact registration and verification screens appear for each current signup method, and does a new Free Edition workspace always expose samples.nyctaxi.trips under Unity Catalog with usable compute?
uncertainties.impact: Missing signup fields, verification, catalog, or compute gates change required actions before Save visualization.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated screenshots of login.databricks.com signup methods and a fresh Free Edition notebook run of the tutorial query.
